CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id Int32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table1 VALUES (1, 'A'), (2, 'B'), (3, 'C');
INSERT INTO test_table2 VALUES (1, 'Description A'), (2, 'Description B');
SELECT * FROM test_table1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 FINAL;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1, test_table2 WHERE test_table1.id = test_table2.id;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 AS t1 JOIN test_table2 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, value FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table1) AS subquery;
SELECT count() FROM test_table1;
SELECT (SELECT count() FROM test_table1) AS total_count, (SELECT count() FROM test_table2) AS total_descriptions;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table2);
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.description FROM test_table1 AS t1 CROSS JOIN test_table2 AS t2;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.description FROM test_table1 AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 UNION ALL SELECT id, description FROM test_table2;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 GROUP BY value HAVING count(value) > 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 WHERE value LIKE 'A%';
SELECT id, value, (SELECT COUNT() FROM test_table2 WHERE id = test_table1.id) AS description_count FROM test_table1;
SELECT id, value FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table1 WHERE id < 3) AS temp_table;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table1 WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table2);
